---
title: "Keisuke Kawata's Website"
---

川田恵介 ([CV](https://www.dropbox.com/s/vck9aa7d460c65o/kawata.pdf?dl=0))

Associate professor, [Institute of Social Sciences](https://www.iss.u-tokyo.ac.jp/), and also [Center for Social Research and Data Archives](https://csrda.iss.u-tokyo.ac.jp/english/), [The University of Tokyo](https://www.u-tokyo.ac.jp/en/index.html) (since 2017).

**Academic area:** Economics

**Research interest:** Labor and Applied Empirical Economics.

**Research papers:** See [google scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=edeB7xsAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao) and [github](https://github.com/tetokawata)

**Lecture (2026):**

  - Machine Learning For Economist (for graduate/undergraduate, at the University of Tokyo)

      - [Github](https://github.com/tetokawata/TargetML)

  - Machine Learning For Economist (for undergraduate, at Musashi University)

      - [Github](https://github.com/tetokawata/UnderGradEconML)
    
  - Intensive
  
    - Data Visualization (for undergraduate, at Tokyo Keizai University)

    - Machine Learning (for working person, at the Japan Center for Economic Research)

  - 補助資料(日本語)

      - [データ分析: 入門](https://tetokawata.github.io/BookEntry/)

      - [母平均の推定: OLSと機械学習](https://tetokawata.github.io/NoteBLP/)
      
      - [格差/因果/比較分析](https://github.com/tetokawata/NoteBalance)
